trends.headline: Azelaic acid serums are SkincareTok's gentle retinol alternative this summer
trends.body: Azelaic acid is surging (~50% YoY demand) as the calm-skin acid that fights acne, rosacea redness and texture without retinol's irritation — perfect for summer-sensitive skin. Creator angle: a '2-week redness diary' before/after, or a 'retinol made my skin worse, here's what I switched to' explainer.

trends.headline: Matcha-infused skincare is BeautyTok's antioxidant glow obsession
trends.body: Matcha is jumping from the cup to the vanity — creators are hyping matcha cleansers, masks and serums for antioxidant, anti-inflammatory 'calm glow' payoff, riding the broader matcha-everything wave. Easy angle: a 'matcha latte AND matcha skincare' morning routine, or a 'do antioxidants actually do anything?' explainer.

trends.headline: Super-long Bermuda shorts are FashionTok's summer bottom of the moment
trends.body: Knee-grazing 'super long' Bermuda shorts are taking over summer styling as the tailored-but-comfy alternative to mini shorts, styled with loafers or sneakers. Creator angle: a 'how to style long Bermudas 5 ways' lookbook, or a 'are Bermuda shorts flattering on everyone?' try-on.

trends.headline: 'Cool girl summer' — turquoise, shell details and statement buttons — is FashionTok's palette
trends.body: FashionTok's summer formula is leaning into turquoise tones, shell and seashell detailing, mini denim and oversized statement buttons for an easy coastal-cool look. Creator angle: a 'cool girl summer haul' or a 'styling one turquoise piece 3 ways' transition video.

trends.headline: 'Pickle-everything' snack plates are FoodTok's salty-summer obsession
trends.body: The savory wave is crystallizing into a full-blown pickle moment — creators are building pickled-everything snack plates (pickles, pickled onions, goat cheese, chips) and pickle-topped bites for crunchy, salty payoff. Creator angle: a 'pickle girl snack board' ASMR build or a 'ranking grocery-store pickles' taste test.

trends.headline: The 12-3-30 treadmill workout is FitTok's beginner-friendly summer cardio
trends.body: The 12-3-30 walk (12% incline, 3 mph, 30 minutes) is surging again as the low-impact, sweat-without-running format that fits any fitness level. Creator angle: a '30-day 12-3-30 results' diary, or a 'what to listen to during 12-3-30' playlist/POV video.

trends.headline: 'Cycle syncing' workouts are WellnessTok's body-aware training trend
trends.body: Creators are syncing workout intensity to their menstrual cycle — HIIT and dance in high-energy phases, yoga and gentle strength in low-energy ones — reframing rest as strategy, not slacking. Creator angle: a 'how I plan my week around my cycle' explainer or a 'phase-by-phase workout' carousel.

trends.headline: 'Grandma-core' eclectic styling is HomeTok's cozy-maximalist summer look
trends.body: Grandma-core — mixed woods and metals, plate walls, layered art, tapestries and colorful kitchens — is HomeTok's antidote to cold minimalism, all warmth and lived-in personality. Creator angle: a 'grandmacore room makeover' before/after or a 'thrift haul: styling grandma-core for cheap' video.

trends.headline: Govee music-sync LED strip lights are TechTok's sub-$20 room-glow upgrade
trends.body: Govee LED strips — 16M colors, app control and music-sync that pulses to your audio, often under $20 — are TechTok's go-to cheap room transformation and background for any video. Creator angle: a 'gaming/desk setup glow-up under $20' or a 'syncing my lights to a beat drop' satisfying reveal.

trends.headline: 3-in-1 pet steaming grooming brushes are PetTok's most satisfying summer buy
trends.body: Multi-function pet brushes that steam, massage and de-shed in one tool are blowing up for satisfying shed-season grooming clips — huge fur payoff on camera. Creator angle: an ASMR 'watch how much fur this pulls' demo or a 'shedding season survival kit' roundup.

trends.headline: 'Ooey Gooey' and Need-oh squishy sensory toys are ParentTok's screen-free obsession
trends.body: Soft, squishy, weirdly-satisfying sensory toys — Ooey Gooey and Need-oh styles — are ParentTok's calming, screen-free pick for fidgety kids this summer. Creator angle: a 'sensory toys that actually calm my toddler' roundup or an ASMR satisfying-squish demo.

trends.headline: 'Cost breakdown with receipts' is TravelTok's most-saved summer format
trends.body: Exact-cost travel videos — showing every receipt and a running total for a trip or a day — are TravelTok's highest-save format, beating dreamy montages because viewers bookmark them to plan. Creator angle: a '$50 a day in [city]' breakdown or a 'what a 3-day trip actually cost me' receipt walkthrough.

trends.headline: Charm bracelets are JewelryTok's storytelling wrist trend
trends.body: The charm wave is moving from necklaces to wrists — build-your-own charm bracelets let creators tell a personal story piece by piece, riding the maximalist self-expression mood. Creator angle: a 'building my charm bracelet, each charm means something' reveal or a 'where to find cheap charms' haul.
